text: The ambiance here feels surreal and a bit disorienting. The deep shadows and neon glow evoke a sense of isolation and futuristic curiosity. The mention of "R+D" on the wall suggests innovation and exploration, yet the emptiness and dim lighting leave me feeling like an observer on the precipice of discovery, yet uncertain of what lies ahead. I am both intrigued and slightly unsettled, as if wandering through the aftermath of ideas waiting to be realized.
